heading: Authorization of appropriations for the preservation of wetlands and other waterfowl habitat
label: 715k–3 Authorization of appropriations for the preservation of wetlands and other waterfowl habitat
text: In order to promote the conservation of migratory waterfowl and to offset or prevent the serious loss of important wetlands and other waterfowl habitat essential to the preservation of such waterfowl, there is authorized to be appropriated for the period beginning on , and ending when all amounts authorized to be appropriated have been expended, not to exceed $200,000,000.July 1, 1961
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of the Migratory Bird Conservation Act which comprises this subchapter.

Short Title, which enacted this section and sections 715k–4 and 715k–5 of this title, is popularly known as the “Wetlands Loan Act”.Pub. L. 87–383
